name: Datazoom
description: Datazoom — real-time video analytics data pipeline for publishers

seo.title: Datazoom — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Datazoom: Datazoom — real-time video analytics data pipeline for publishers

when_to_use: Real-time QoE metrics pipeline for OTT video platforms
Streaming video player events to Snowflake or BigQuery
Per-viewer engagement analytics for broadcast applications
Replacing custom log pipelines with managed video data collection
Publisher analytics dashboards backed by real-time event streams

pros: Unified video data pipeline across players
Vendor-neutral: works with any player SDK
Strong at identifying rebuffering root causes
cons: Docs assume familiarity with video analytics
Overkill for teams with single-player setups
review.verdict: Specialist video-telemetry pipeline — valuable for broadcasters juggling many players, wasted on simple stacks.
review.best_for: OTT operators and publishers needing player-agnostic QoE data in their own warehouse.
review.not_for: Single-player apps — Mux Data or Bitmovin is simpler.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
